summary: AI/ML Engineer and Data Science enthusiast pursuing BTech in Computer Science (AI) with hands-on experience building machine learning pipelines, NLP systems, and LLM-powered applications. Proficient in Python, scikit-learn, TensorFlow, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL. Delivered production-grade projects across sentiment analysis, predictive analytics, and intelligent document processing — reducing manual workflows by up to 90%. Seeking AI/ML or Data Science roles to apply analytical thinking and engineering skills to real-world problems.

bullet_points: Built an analytics system for MSME operations, automating 5+ manual tracking workflows and reducing human errors by 90%, saving approximately 10 hours of operational work per week.
Designed Python-based data pipelines for RFM customer segmentation and sales forecasting models, boosting customer retention by 20% and increasing revenue by 35% within the engagement period.
Configured structured PostgreSQL data storage with cloud-based document handling, accelerating data retrieval time by 40% across 3 core operational modules.
Processed and cleaned 1.5M+ agricultural data points using Python (Pandas, NumPy), uncovering 646 district-level yield patterns across 28 states for crop production insights.
Developed 5+ interactive multi-year crop trend dashboards using Matplotlib and Streamlit, visualizing seasonal and state-wise yield variations to support data-driven agricultural decisions.
Produced 3 detailed analytical reports on post-2010 yield declines, identifying production optimization opportunities across 10+ key crops and 15+ high-value districts.

projects.name: OrderEazy Analytics
bullet_points: Architected a FastAPI backend integrated with Supabase/PostgreSQL, automating billing workflows for 500+ monthly transactions and eliminating manual billing errors entirely across all transaction records.
Launched a Gemini API-powered AI Business Analyst module that auto-generates 10+ specific business insights per session, cutting manual reporting time by 70%.
Automated a document processing pipeline for e-way bill uploads (PDFs and images), eliminating 3+ manual extraction steps per workflow and improving data handling efficiency by 15%.

projects.name: AI Stock News Sentiment Analyser
bullet_points: Engineered a financial news discovery system using Python and FastAPI, continuously monitoring 50+ live news streams with 100% uptime and sub-second processing latency.
Deployed a FinBERT NLP sentiment classification pipeline achieving 85%+ accuracy, detecting buy/sell market signals across 200+ financial articles daily.
Constructed a REST API-driven analytics dashboard visualizing real-time sentiment and price trends for 20+ stock tickers, reducing manual market research time by 60%.

projects.name: Smart Notes Application
bullet_points: Established an AI-powered Flask web platform for secure PDF uploads and automated summarization, supporting documents of 50+ pages with 95%+ content retention accuracy.
Implemented Hugging Face Transformer-based NLP models for GenAI document summarization and conversational Q&A, reducing average document review time by 50% per user session.

Optimized PDF management workflows with real-time summary generation and formatted export features, cutting average document turnaround time by 40% and streamlining delivery across the entire platform.

education.degree: BTech Computer Science Engineering - Artificial Intelligence
